overall.description: Aerial drone footage from a video game showing flight over vast snowy mountain terrain. The clip begins in overcast foggy conditions, transitions to clear sunny skies with detailed snow dunes, and ends with the drone entering a heavy blizzard with near-whiteout visibility.

scene_state.functional_zone: snow-covered mountain ridge in overcast conditions

events.description: fog clears and bright sun becomes visible through the cloud layer

agents.ego_description: flying drone forward over mountain terrain surveying the snowy landscape below

entered.detail: snowy mountain ridge with dark rocky patches visible beneath the snow
snow-capped mountain peaks lining the horizon
bright sun partially obscured by thin high-altitude clouds

segments.scene_description: The drone flies over a snow-covered mountain ridge in foggy overcast conditions. Around the 4-second mark, the fog clears revealing a bright sun and distant mountain ranges on the horizon. The terrain below shows wind-sculpted snow patterns.

scene_state.functional_zone: vast snow-covered dunes under clear sunny skies

events.description: camera descends rapidly toward a rocky outcrop then pulls back up to altitude

agents.ego_description: flying over expansive snow dunes and dipping down to inspect rocky terrain up close

entered.detail: dark jagged rocks breaking through the snow cover with detailed texture

segments.scene_description: Flying over vast snow dunes under clear sunny skies, the drone maintains steady forward motion. At around 20 seconds, it descends sharply toward a rocky outcrop to show detailed ground texture before ascending again. The distant mountain range remains visible on the left.

scene_state.functional_zone: snow fields with approaching storm front reducing visibility

events.description: weather begins to deteriorate as a snowstorm approaches from the distance

agents.ego_description: continuing forward flight as visibility gradually decreases due to approaching weather

entered.detail: wall of white snow and fog approaching from the horizon

changed.to: dimmed and partially obscured by approaching clouds

segments.scene_description: The drone continues over snow fields as a storm front approaches from the distance. Visibility gradually decreases and the sun becomes dimmed by the incoming weather system. The distant mountains begin to fade into the haze.

events.description: visibility drops significantly as drone enters heavy snowfall and blowing snow
sun becomes barely visible as a faint glow through dense snow and fog

agents.ego_description: flying through heavy blizzard conditions with minimal visibility, navigating by instruments

changed.to: barely visible faint glow through whiteout conditions

segments.scene_description: The drone enters a heavy blizzard with near-whiteout conditions. Visibility drops to near zero as blowing snow engulfs the camera. The sun is reduced to a faint glow in the sky while the terrain below becomes barely visible through the dense snowfall.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous aerial journey over a snowy mountain range that transforms from a foggy morning into a brilliant sunny day before being consumed by a violent blizzard. It begins by gliding over a mountain ridge in overcast fog, which gradually clears to reveal a bright sun and distant peaks overlooking wind-sculpted snow patterns. As the camera maintains its forward motion across vast snow dunes, it descends sharply toward a rocky outcrop to capture detailed ground textures before ascending back into the clear sky. The scene then shifts as a storm front approaches from the horizon, dimming the sunlight and causing the distant mountains to fade into a growing haze. Finally, the drone enters a heavy blizzard where visibility drops to near zero and the terrain vanishes beneath a dense, whiteout wall of blowing snow.
